title: Update TUI dashboard color palette to match crosslink init walkthrough style

comments.author: maxine-at-forecast--noether--tui-dashboard
comments.content: Plan: Align TUI dashboard colors with init walkthrough palette. Key changes: (1) Tab bar border DarkGray instead of default, title brand 'crosslink' in Cyan+Bold (2) Active tab highlight Cyan+Bold instead of Yellow (3) Status bar help keys Cyan instead of Yellow (4) Issues list header Cyan+Bold instead of Yellow (5) Selected row highlight subtle Gray bg (6) Help overlay title Cyan+Bold (7) Detail view headings White+Bold, muted text DarkGray. Overall: replace Yellow accent with Cyan, add Green for 'open' status.
